error_signature: failed to calculate checksum of ref
title: Docker build fails due to missing dist folder
symptom: During the Docker build process for the task runner, an error occurs stating 'failed to calculate checksum of ref' due to a missing dist folder.
applies_when: Building a custom Docker image for n8n task runner
Using a specific version of n8n
not_this_if: The dist folder exists with the required files
Using the latest version of n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the Docker build process expects a 'dist' folder containing necessary files, which is not created if the build process for n8n is not run prior to building the task runner image.
fix_steps: Ensure the n8n main docker image and the task runner docker image are of the same version.
Run 'pnpm run build:n8n' to create the dist folder and necessary files.
Build the Docker image for the task runner using the provided docker build command.
agent_instruction: Run the necessary build commands before building the Docker image for the task runner.
